name: motion-scroll-progress
title: Scroll Progress
author: Motion Primitives
description: Maps page or container scroll progress to a horizontal indicator.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/utils to ../../lib/utils for source-batch and install-target portability.
Used the direct scroll motion value instead of the spring when reduced motion is requested.
Allowed a nullable container ref for current React ref typing.
Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.

modifications.change: Changed the local utility import, bypassed spring lag for reduced motion, and widened the container ref type to include null. Adjusted TypeScript annotations for the unified React 19 and Motion 12 catalog host without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied helper, keep progress directly tied to scroll position under reduced motion, and compile with current React ref types. Compile several upstream Motion 11-era components safely in the shared catalog while preserving their rendered behavior and install API.
